summary: Lead accepts M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 after writer implementation, systems_architect ACCEPT, independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT, and lead integration gates. The accepted branch adds presentation-only design tokens, neutral placeholder asset slots, map render presentation tokens, Storybook evidence, and focused unit/E2E coverage without changing authoritative simulation, protocol, save, Electron, dependencies, content-source, final art, or Human Gate scope.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for task, thread registry, goal-mode, model-routing, writer/systems/QA handoffs

tests_run.result: Passed; existing Vite large chunk warning only.
Passed; existing Storybook plugin timing and large chunk warnings only.
Format, lint, typecheck, and architecture boundaries passed.

decisions.decision: Accept this task as a presentation-only M7 UI foundation. Tokens, slots, map render constants, Storybook evidence, and tests do not become authoritative simulation, history, content, save, command, or protocol state.

No Human Gate is active or required because no final art, culture-specific production asset, dependency, save/protocol schema, Electron/security boundary, telemetry/server/cloud/mod behavior, manual-node-battle reversal, or frozen product/platform/core architecture change is introduced.
Downstream M7 app shell, map presentation, district inspector, appointment flow, guidance, and UI regression matrix tasks may consume the exported token and slot APIs under their own task scopes.

risks.summary: Legacy shell literal CSS remains outside this foundation task.
risks.mitigation: Downstream M7 UI quality tasks should migrate touched surfaces to CLIENT_DESIGN_TOKENS, CSS variables, and asset slot APIs.

risks.summary: This task defines replacement slots but approves no production art or culture-specific asset.
risks.mitigation: Future final art slot population must route through art, culture, historical, localization, systems, and QA review before integration.

requested_action: Open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, then mark M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 CLOSED only after origin/main contains the accepted commits.
